name: Prosciutto & Green Pea Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the thinly sliced green onions in butter for 2 or 3 minutes over medium heat until soft.
2. Add the prosciutto and cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in the rice and cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the rice is lightly browned.
4. Add the dry white wine and stir until it is absorbed.
5. Increase the heat to medium-high and add one cup of hot chicken broth. Stir and allow it to be absorbed before adding more.
6. Continue adding the remaining broth, water, and peas in cups, allowing each cup to be absorbed completely, until the rice is tender and the mixture has a creamy consistency. This process will take approximately 25 to 30 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the cream, Parmesan cheese, chopped basil leaves, dried basil, and ground white pepper. Stir until the mixture is creamy.
8. Serve immediately.
